subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God! The Light of Baṭḥá hath drawn a multitude unto Him through the Name of the True One, glorified be His majesty, and enabled them to attain unto the visitation of the House [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله نور بطحا خلق کثیری را باسم حق جل جلاله جذب نمود و بزیارت بیت موفق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital
